_doctrine: 13-phase Wall Street cycle. Phase is JORDAN'S call (editorial). Until he calls it, phase='Awaiting Jordan's call' and phase_source='awaiting'. Score + trend are facts and always present; phase_suggestion is the auto/brain advisory. next_move is the FORWARD prediction (brain consensus) — where the phase goes next; current phase stays the anchor.

next_move.reasoning: With the live score at 33 sitting in the Denial band (32-38) and risk-off divergences still unresolved, the immediate path of least resistance is a continued downward drift into Denial before any bottoming narrative can be confirmed.
next_move.brains_agree: No — the analyst calls a grind UP to Complacency while the narrative implicitly leans toward a bottoming reversal; the consensus splits the difference by honoring the score's current downward leg.
next_move.confirmed_if: fear_greed drops below 25 and BTC breaks $62,000 with rising volume
next_move.invalidated_if: BTC holds $65,000 and fear_greed climbs above 40 with funding cooling below 0.002%
